name: cloud-provider
description: Cloud provider infrastructure operations for node pool management, IAM, and networking. Used by capacity-planner and incident-responder for node-level operations.

gcp.auth: Application Default Credentials (gcloud auth application-default login)

aws.auth: AWS credentials via AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID and AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY or instance role

notes: Configure the active provider in your environment. Only the configured provider is available per session.
